untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'extreme sentiment reading (>80th percentile retail positioning)' which is not available in the allowed indicators list. No direct retail sentiment or positioning indicator is provided. Used RSI as a proxy for extreme conditions but this is not equivalent to retail positioning data.
translation_notes: Translated uninformed trader behavior patterns as RSI extremes (>80 for bullish, <20 for bearish). Volume spike translated using vol_ratio_20 > 1.1. Price movement direction captured via returns indicator. Sentiment-driven reversal approximated via RSI mean reversion (exit when RSI crosses 50). Original signal lacks explicit entry direction, so both long and short conditions provided with CONTEXT_DEPENDENT flag. 5% loss stop and 5-period hold converted from parameters.
